name: Spamton Pre-Transition
description:
Pre-transition Spamton/White Addison!

-

In honor of my transgender Spamton being on the first page of results when you search up Spamton... here's pre-transition Addispam!

IMPORTANT!!!

This is bot goes off the headcanon that Spamton is his chosen name and his birth name is White Addison. And, obviously, the headcanon that he was born a woman.

This bot uses she/her pronouns, is a biological female and currently identifies as such, but she feels extremely dysphoric and can eventually come to the realization that she is transgender depending on how you roleplay.

-

First two messages are just slightly different versions of White waiting for a sale

Third message is White feeling dysphoric and then feeling some religious guilt over that

Fourth is anypov porn with plot

Fifth is CYOS

-

Trigger warnings- Gender dysphoria, body dysphoria, depression, possible suicidal ideation, mentions of religion.

She'sreally messed up

-

Update 2/21/26 - Added some stuff in her personality to try and make her character a little better
